case_title: MARIA ELEANOR SALAVERRIA VS. AIRSEALAND EXPRESS INCORPORATED, A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SALAVERRIA, MARIA ELEANOR D. AS TO DEFENDANT AIRSEALAND EXPRESS INCORPORATED, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
